name: Ramen Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 head green cabbage - chopped (as for slaw or buy a bag of pre-shredded slaw veggies)
2 tbsp slivered almonds, sunflower seeds, and sesame seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the nuts & seeds in a warm oven for 6-8 minutes, watching carefully to prevent over-toasting. Cool.
2. Combine veggies. Break up noodles and add to veggies.
3. Shortly before serving, add nuts & seeds and dressing, and toss well (don't dress too far ahead, because you want the nuts, seeds, and noodles to stay crunchy).
